title: Humanoid Locomotion & Navigation
description: Annotate bipedal locomotion data from Figure 02 deployment recordings. Contributors label gait phases, surface transitions, obstacle interactions, and recovery behaviors to train stable whole-body locomotion policies.

tasks.title: Upload locomotion recording
tasks.description: Provide a walking/navigation video in a warehouse or indoor environment (1–5 minutes).

tasks.title: Pose & gait detection
tasks.description: Full-body pose estimation, gait phase detection, floor surface classification.

tasks.title: Locomotion annotation
tasks.description: Label gait phases (stance/swing/double-support), surface type (concrete/carpet/ramp), and flag recovery events (stumble, pause, rebalance).

tasks.title: Gait consistency check
tasks.description: Phase duration distributions, pose skeleton completeness, surface label coverage.
